Module com.bifasico.soduko
Package com.bifasico.soduko.model

Class Board

java.lang.Object
com.bifasico.soduko.model.Board
public class Board extends Object
Represents the root node of the Sudoku board tree structure. The Board owns all 6 Region children, each of which contains 6 Cell leaves.

Tree hierarchy: 

   Board (root)
   └── Region × 6 (branches)
       └── Cell × 6 (leaves)

The board represents a 6×6 Sudoku grid divided into six 2×3 regions.

  • Constructor Details

    • Board

      public Board()
      Constructs a new Board and initializes all 6 regions with their cells.

  • Method Details

    • getRegions

      public ArrayList<Region> getRegions()
      Returns all 6 regions (children) of this board.
      Returns:
      the list of regions in index order (0-5)

    • getRegion

      public Region getRegion(int index)
      Returns the region at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - the region index (0-5)
      Returns:
      the Region at that index

    • getCellAt

      public Cell getCellAt(int row, int column)
      Finds and returns the cell at the given absolute grid coordinates by traversing the board tree.
      Parameters:
      row - the absolute row (0-5)
      column - the absolute column (0-5)
      Returns:
      the Cell at that position, or null if coordinates are invalid

    • getRegionFor

      public Region getRegionFor(int row, int column)
      Returns the region that owns the cell at the given absolute coordinates.
      Parameters:
      row - the absolute row (0-5)
      column - the absolute column (0-5)
      Returns:
      the owning Region, or null if coordinates are out of bounds

    • isGuessValid

      public boolean isGuessValid(int row, int column, int value)
      Validates whether the player's guess at a given cell violates any Sudoku rule. Checks the row, column, and region constraints for the given coordinates and value.
      Parameters:
      row - the absolute row of the cell to validate
      column - the absolute column of the cell to validate
      value - the player's guess (1-6)
      Returns:
      true if the guess is valid (no conflict found)

    • isSolved

      public boolean isSolved()
      Returns whether the board is fully and correctly solved. Every non-given cell must have a guess matching its solution value.
      Returns:
      true if all cells are correctly filled

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets all non-given cells, clearing player guesses and marked states.
